{{Quote|And no tricks, Jedi. We Sith have never been known for our patience.|White Eyes|<ref name="inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>}}
'''White Eyes''' was a prominent [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the early [[One Sith]]. [[Alema Rar]] encountered him in the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. As he did not vouch his name to her, she so regarded him for the penetrating [[white]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], the only part of him visible beneath the cowl of his cloak.

==Biography==
White Eyes led the interrogation of [[Alema Rar]] upon her arrival at their cloister on Korriban. Alema had originally come to Korriban in an effort to find help for [[Darth Caedus]], who she felt was losing his way following the death of his Sith mentor [[Lumiya]]. However, White Eyes and the thirty or so [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] who gathered to examine her initially had no inclination to help, and to be told that they were operating entirely independently of Lumiya. When White Eyes was convinced by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] to render aid, he gave her [[Holocron of Darth Vectivus|the holocron]] of [[Darth Vectivus]] as a gift for Caedus.<ref name="inferno" />

During a later meeting of members of One Sith, White Eyes ordered [[Dician]] to take the [[Poison Moon (starship)|''Poison Moon'']] to capture or kill Alema. He also ordered Dician to take any Sith artifacts found in Lumiya's asteroid base. His intentions with capturing Alema were to learn Darth Vectivus' [[Force phantom]] technique and capture its source of power.<ref name="inferno" />

==Personality and Traits==
Like all the members of the group, White Eyes dressed in a hooded black cloak, and also black gloves. He spoke in a deep, rough voice. In his encounter with Alema, White Eyes' firm, insistent attitude was accented by flashes of emotional intensity, and also by lapses into a dryly ironic tone, which masked the moments in which he adopted a more conciliatory attitude.<ref name="inferno" />

==Powers and Abilities==
The Sith was capable of [[Mechu-deru|reading information off a memory chip without the use of a machine]]. The Sith Lord had the power to examine other’s auras and [[Truth-sense|find if they were lying]]. He also displayed the more conventional [[Force power/Legends|skills]] of [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Choke|Force choke]], and [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Push|Force pull/push]].<ref name="inferno" />

His most notable feature, however, were his eyes, which glowed brighter depending on his emotional state. White Eyes' eyes seemed to Rar as pale at first, but still visible in the shadows beneath the hood of his his cloak; they are then to have flared twice, in moments of intense suspicion and anger, and at one point Alema thought they glowed with understanding.<ref name="inferno" />

However, White Eyes was not invulnerable. Alema, a Twi'lek Jedi Knight driven insane by her experiences in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Swarm War]], had learned how to manipulate people's perceptions of the truth when she was brainwashed to become the [[Night Herald]] of the [[Gorog]] hive-mind. She was able to persuade White Eyes that she had killed [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], and that she herself had been Sith-trained by Lumiya.<ref name="inferno" />
